prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-LKCIPHAC-2-PK Product Type: PERSONAL_PILL_DISPENSER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (6-PACK) Mini Waterproof Container ID Pill Holder Vial Key Chain with O Ring Seal Description: Keep your identification and other crucial information on your person while traveling with the ASR Outdoor ID Holder Capsule.

The ASR Outdoor Waterproof Storage Container is great for kids, adults, and the elderly to keep personal and emergency information with you at all times, especially while traveling. These key chain containers can be attached to just about any key chain, handbag, jacket, or backpack. Each capsule measures just 1.75" in length and has a .5" diameter, so it won't bulk up your key chain.

The aluminum body and o-ring cap will ensure that contents stay dry during inclement weather. We've even included a plastic storage vial for an added layer of protection. Make sure to keep a few of these around to organize pills, IDs, and other important tiny items.

PLEASE NOTE colors ship at random. If you'd like a specific color, please message us and we will try our best to accommodate you based on availability. Search Terms: mini pocket stash safe hidding place powder container waterproof seal keychain pill holder micro small case assorted colors travel storage Features: - VERSATILE STORAGE CAPSULE - Designed to Discreetly Keep Personal and Emergency Information on Hand and While Traveling | Great for Kids, Adults, and the Elderly - WATERPROOF CONSTRUCTION - Capsule ID Holder made of Durable and Waterproof Aluminum | Comes with Small Plastic Storage Vial for Added Layer of Protection | Use Rain or Shine - CONVENIENT KEYCHAIN DESIGN - O-Ring Sealed Capsule Comes with Classic Key Chain to Easily Attach to Keys | Keep on Purse, Backpack, Travel Bag or Car Keys for Quick Access to Vital Information - SMALL AND LIGHT - Capsule Measures Just 1.75" in Length with .5" Diameter, .01lbs Weight | Won't Bulk Up Your Keys, Bag or Backpack - ASSORTED COLORS - Please Note that Colors Ship at Random | Color Options: Green, Silver, Purple, Red, Black or Blue === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Mini Waterproof Pill Holder Keychain Container

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-Pk Mini Waterproof ID Holder Capsule

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Aluminum, O-Ring Seal, ID Storage, Assorted Colors, Compact Keychain Design, Travel Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof Aluminum Construction, O-Ring Seal, Keychain Attachment, Includes Plastic Vial, Assorted Colors
